title: Verify match-first statement reconciliation
preconditions: Approved statement evidence covering unique strong match, zero candidate, multiple candidates, conflicting evidence, stale projection, unsupported policy, and replay cases.
steps: Apply each reconciliation case through the public CLI; inspect canonical transaction count, evidence links, decisions, current states, errors, and exact actuals before and after; replay successful logical inputs.
expected: A unique valid match links the existing transaction only; an approved zero-candidate case creates one statement-only transaction; ambiguous, stale, conflicting, or unsupported cases apply nothing; replay creates no duplicate effect.
